bitcoin_ethereum.exchanger: Convertex24 This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.

bitcoin_tether-erc20.exchanger: YellowChanger This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order.

bitcoin_solana.exchanger: Crystal-Trade This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order.

solana_bitcoin.exchanger: Ex-Bank This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.

bitcoin_litecoin.exchanger: BitFm This exchanger states the exchange rate in the request if the market exchange rate changes by not more than 0.25 %. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.

litecoin_bitcoin.exchanger: Xenex This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order.

bitcoin_ripple.exchanger: Crystal-Trade This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order.

bitcoin_dogecoin.exchanger: 4ange This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.

bitcoin_cardano.exchanger: Crypto-Polis This exchanger states the exchange rate in the request if the market exchange rate changes by not more than 0.1 %. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.

bitcoin_tron.exchanger: AlwaysMoney This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order.

bitcoin_avalanche.exchanger: InstantExchangers This exchanger states the exchange rate in the request for not more than 1 min. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.

bitcoin_polkadot.exchanger: LovanPay This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order. This exchanger may require verification of the client's documents or halt the payment to check other data. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.

bitcoin_chainlink.exchanger: Monease This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order.

bitcoin_monero.exchanger: KriptoMenyalka This exchanger states the exchange rate in the request if the market exchange rate changes by not more than 0.15 %. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.
